abstracts.abstract: By Mrs. Dooner and Mr. Howitt, of Seekonk a joint petition (accompanied by bill) (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Kelly A. Dooner and Steven S. Howitt for legislation relative to retirement benefits for Alec Ciminello.  Public Service.

bill.title: An Act relative to retirement benefits for Alec Ciminello

action.description: Discharged from committee and recommitted to the committee on Public Service
